name: Basil-Tarragon Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large carrots, peeled and sliced into 1/4 inch pieces
1 small zucchini squash, halved and cut into 1/3 inch slices
1 small yellow squash, halved and cut into 1/3 inch slices
2 medium tomatoes, cut into 1/2 inch wedges
1 can artichoke hearts, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces
1 bunch green onions, cleaned and chopped
6 ounces salad pasta cooked according to package directions. Blanch in cold water and drain when cooked.
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli until tender crisp. Blanch in cold water and drain.
2. In a two-quart covered saucepan, bring 1 quart of water to a vigorous boil under high heat.
3. Blanch carrots and squash in boiling water for 30 seconds. Start timing when water returns to a boil. Immediately rinse in cold water and drain.
4. Combine prepared vegetables, 3 tablespoons parmesan cheese, and vinegarette in a large bowl. Toss gently to coat all pieces.
5. Cover and refrigerate until chilled. About an hour later.
6. Uncover and toss occasionally while marinating in the refrigerator.
7. Spoon salad into suitable serving dishes. Garnish lightly with additional fresh grated parmesan cheese. Serve with fresh grated parmesan cheese available to top as individual taste dictates.
Makes 6 to 8 servings
